name: Chocolate Chip Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and 2 cups powdered sugar until smooth.
2. Add salt, vanilla extract, and flour; mix to combine.
3. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Pinch off pieces of dough about the size of a walnut.
5. Roll into 1-inch balls and flatten with fork on baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with powdered sugar while hot.
